description: Computes the union (logical OR) of clippable shapes. Returns the combined area of all input shapes. Useful for creating merged regions, Venn diagrams, and complex composite shapes.
utility: Combine multiple shapes into a single merged region

alternates.description: Union of two circles (Venn diagram shape)
Union of three or more shapes

examples.expression:
G = g2d()
C1 = circle(G, 3, 0, 0)
C2 = circle(G, 3, 4, 0)
U = or(G, C1, C2)

G = g2d()
S1 = square(G, 0, 0, 4)
S2 = square(G, 2, 2, 4)
U = or(G, S1, S2)

G = g2d()
C1 = circle(G, 2, -2, 0)
C2 = circle(G, 2, 2, 0)
C3 = circle(G, 2, 0, 3)
U = or(G, C1, C2, C3)
